name: DA: Rescue South Africa
objective: Mobilize voters around ending load shedding and creating a job-friendly environment.
mainMessage: A government that works: Ending load shedding, creating jobs, and delivering services for all South Africans.
talkingPoints: Ending Load Shedding: Privatizing energy and bringing in independent power producers.
Job Creation: Cutting red tape for small businesses and scrapping race-based policies (BEE).
Safe Communities: Professionalizing the police and giving more power to local law enforcement.
Proven Governance: The DA-led Western Cape model of clean audits and delivery.

questions.prompt: How many hours of load shedding did you experience in the last 24 hours?
Do you believe your local municipality is delivering quality services?
Will you support the DA to rescue South Africa from economic collapse?
